name: Dire Dash
explicitMods: 12% chance to gain Elusive on Critical Strike
craftedMods: 11% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

socketedItems.secDescrText: Detonates a Mine, starting a Detonation Sequence which will detonate other Mines around it.
explicitMods:
First Mine Detonates Instantly
Mines get 10% more Detonation Speed for each prior Mine in Detonation Sequence
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff which can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

70% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take 1317 Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. Performing any skill replaces this buff with one that boosts melee physical damage of skills you use yourself (it will not apply to your melee skills used by totems). Consumes Frenzy Charges to increase duration.
explicitMods: 100% increased Skill Duration per Frenzy Charge removed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Gain 22% of Missing Unreserved Life before being Hit by an Enemy
flavourText: The farmer was struck again and again, but he refused to stay down.
Astonished, the raiding warlord ordered the man's family spared.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Acceleration Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

name: Enmity's Embrace
explicitMods: Take 370 Fire Damage when you Use a Skill
Damage Penetrates Fire Resistance equal to your Overcapped Fire Resistance, up to a maximum of 200%
flavourText: In truth, your terror is cold
You mask it with heat and ire
But they know.
They know.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Rathpith Globe
explicitMods: Sacrifice 8% of your Life when you Use or Trigger a Spell Skill
6% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance per 100 Player Maximum Life
5% increased Spell Damage per 100 Player Maximum Life
flavourText: The Vaal emptied their slaves of beating hearts,
and left a mountain of twitching dead.

properties.name: Mine, Spell, AoE, Duration, Movement, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Throws a mine that will teleport you to it when detonated. It covers both your escape and arrival with a cloud of smoke that blinds enemies, and gives you a temporary buff to movement speed. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Mine Duration also apply to this Skill's Buff Duration
Only one Mine of this type can Detonate in each Detonation Sequence
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will raise the quality of supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.

name: Doedre's Elixir
explicitMods: Removes 80% of your maximum Energy Shield on use
You take 50% of your maximum Life as Chaos Damage on use
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Doedre Darktongue knew the Way of the Thaumaturge.
In order to receive, one must give... without hesitation.

implicitMods: 20% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
+12% to Fire Damage over Time Multiplier

alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

flavourText: The giant cares not for the ants.

socketedItems.secDescrText: This spell creates ethereal blades which orbit in an area around you, dealing damage every 0.6 seconds to all enemies in their radius. As more blades are added, the damage becomes greater and more frequent.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Critical Strikes
explicitMods: 40% increased Hit Rate for each blade
Can have up to 10 active spinning blades

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support skills with cooldowns, triggered skills, Brand skills, Vaal skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Supported Spells gain a Seal every 0.68 seconds, to a maximum of 4 Seals
Supported Spells are Unsealed when cast, and their effects Reoccur for each Seal lost
Supported Skills deal 33% less Damage when Reoccurring
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "True power grows with patience. You must nurture it.
You learn what it needs. You provide. You wait. Only
then, when it is ripe, does it yield its fruits."

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.

name: The Gull
explicitMods: Trigger Level 1 Create Lesser Shrine when you Kill an Enemy
80% increased Effect of Shrine Buffs on you
56% increased Duration of Shrine Effects on you
flavourText: "It is the Gull that delivers Man unto Ancestor.
The consumer of our flesh. The seeder of our
souls unto the earth. We give the Gull his life.
The Gull gives us our Way."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants fire resistance to you and your allies.

You and nearby allies gain 3% additional maximum Fire Resistance

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 81% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Nebulis
explicitMods: 6% increased Elemental Damage per 1% Fire, Cold, or Lightning Resistance above 75%
flavourText: The vastness of the cosmos holds energies beyond comprehension,
should one have the fortitude to grasp them.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, making them more vulnerable to Critical Strikes. Killing the cursed enemy will grant life and mana, and a power charge. You can only have one Mark at a time.

Hits against Cursed Enemies have +1.5% to Critical Strike Chance
Hits against Cursed Enemies have +49% to Critical Strike Multiplier
Cursed enemies grant 600 Life when Killed
Cursed enemies grant 80 Mana when Killed
Cursed Enemies have a 5% chance to grant a Power Charge when Hit
